title: Small Crosshair [v2]
description: This texturepacks changes the crosshair shape into a smaller version with a hole in the middle to improve aim and have better visibility in game
body:
Don't get me wrong, Minecraft's default crosshair is really iconic, but it gets really repetitive after a while doesn't it? This texturepack gives the crosshair a slimmer and cleaner design to improve in-game aim and performance while giving much better visibility.

This is a modified version of my previous small crosshair, this time having a hole in the middle.
